creator: petr.fischer@me.com
text:
+1

Don't want pulseaudio. OSS (+ ALSA over OSS) is just enough as default.

Author can change importance to "affects some people" :)

If the chromium can support PulseAudio dynamically like Firefox (if PA is instaled, use it, else use ALSA), so, just remove dependency from chromium port, or not?
